title: Section 18A
content: 1[18A. Authorities and inspector to be public servant.--The authorities referred to in section 7A and every inspector shall be deemed to be a public servant within the meaning of section 21 of the Indian Penal Code.]]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 7 of 2017, s. 159, for section 18A (w.e.f. 26-5-2017).
